meta.title: Contact Verity Minecraft
meta.description: Contact Verity Minecraft for source corrections, download link updates, privacy questions, and site feedback.

legal.title: Contact Verity Minecraft
legal.description: Reach the Verity Minecraft team for corrections, download-source updates, privacy questions, and general site feedback.

sections.heading: Email
paragraphs: For corrections, source updates, privacy requests, and general feedback, email support@verityminecraft.blog.

sections.heading: What to Include
bullets: The page URL you are asking about.
The source link or version note that may need correction.
A short explanation of the issue and, when possible, the official or maintained source that supports the correction.

sections.heading: Independence Notice
paragraphs: Verity Minecraft is an independent guide. We cannot provide official Minecraft, Mojang, Microsoft, CurseForge, Modrinth, Google Play, or Verity creator support, but we can correct this site's guidance when a source changes.
